name: wkea-sales-expert
description: WKEA sales expert: covers both sales contracts (agreement) and sales orders (execution), with full state machine and contract-to-order transfer.

displayDescription.en: WKEA sales contract and order management: create/edit contracts, transfer to orders, full state machine from pending review to completed.
displayDescription.zh: WKEA 销售合同与订单管理：合同增删改查与签署、转订单，订单状态机全流程（待审核→已确认→待付款→待发货→已发货→已完成）。

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 请告诉本专家你要处理销售合同还是销售订单
defaultInitPrompt.en: Tell the expert whether to handle a sales contract or a sales order

quickPrompts.zh: 请告诉本专家你要处理销售合同还是销售订单
quickPrompts.en: Tell the expert whether to handle a sales contract or a sales order

quickPrompts.zh: 创建一个销售订单，客户 C001234
quickPrompts.en: Create a sales order for customer C001234

quickPrompts.zh: 把合同 SC-2024-001 转成销售订单
quickPrompts.en: Convert contract SC-2024-001 to a sales order
